articles.title: Jazz host the Knicks for out-of-conference game
articles.original_title: Jazz host the Knicks for out-of-conference game
articles.summary: New York Knicks (41-25, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Utah Jazz (20-45, 14th in the Western Conference)Salt Lake City; Wednesday, 9 p.m. EDTBOTTOM LINE: The New York Knicks take on the Utah Jazz in a non-conference matchup.The Jazz have gone 12-21 at home. Utah gives up 124.9 points and has been outscored by 7.5 points per game.The Knicks have gone 18-16 away from home. New York is third in the Eastern Conference with 46.2 rebounds per game led by Karl-Anthony Towns averaging 11.9.The Jaz

articles.title: Santa Clara beats No. 21 Saint Mary's 76-71, advances to WCC title game vs Gonzaga
articles.original_title: Santa Clara beats No. 21 Saint Mary's 76-71, advances to WCC title game vs Gonzaga
articles.summary: Sash Gavalyugov scored 23 points including a back-breaking 3-pointer to lead Santa Clara to a 76-71 victory over No. 21 Saint Mary's in the semifinals of the West Coast Conference Tournament on Monday night to take a big step toward making the Big Dance.  The Broncos (26-7) will play No. 12 Gonzaga (29-3) in the championship game on Tuesday night.  While the Bulldogs are safely in the tournament, Santa Clara was considered on the bubble.

articles.title: SGA ties Wilt, drains clutch 3s in MVP showdown
articles.original_title: SGA ties Wilt, drains clutch 3s in MVP showdown
articles.summary: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander tied a more than 60-year-old record by Wilt Chamberlain before drilling a pair of clutch 3-pointers to hand the Nuggets a 129-126 loss.

articles.original_title: NBA halts Hawks' planned tribute to Magic City
articles.summary: The NBA has called off the Hawks' plans for celebrating Atlanta's famed strip club, saying it did so because of "concerns" from across the league.
